Mild cardiomegaly with mild pulmonary vascular congestion. Small bilateral pleural effusions with bibasilar patchy opacities, likely compressive atelectasis, though infection is not excluded in the correct clinical setting. Correlation with nonemergent CT is recommended for further assessment.
No acute cardiac or pulmonary process. Pneumomediastinum and pneumoperitoneum are not necessarily unexpected findings in a patient status post recent hiatal hernia repair.
